transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have these new bibimmyeon flavor
This is not an ad
Got the new flavor
It took 2 days to get here
So sadly I'm not the first one
Anyways, let's try it
They have these regular liquid sauce
If you put in the "challenge" one
It's going to be really really really spicy
Let's do the normal one first and then add the challenge packet later
I will not be able to continue the mukbang if I start with it
I can start showing you guys the "fuels" starting tomorrow
I'm under a contract until tomorrow
Since I'm not streaming tomorrow, You guys will see it on Monday

Take it out, take it out!
I'll take this out and put it in later I apologize
Crazy crazy crazy
I'm scared
I have 5 servings of noodles Will that 1 packet of "challenge" make any difference?
Is that enough sauce?
This feels like a lot of noodles Did I put more? Weird
This is the thinly sliced pork belly And whole-spam
These are fried eggs
Bon appetit
I'm curious to how it would taste
Thank you
It's sweet and spicy
Yeah, spicy
It doesn't hit right away It just lingers
What's makes this different from the regular one is that

It's like a mix of the sweet & spicy flavor and the fire chicken noodles
It's numbing
It's delicious
Some pork belly to cool the spiciness
I can do it
Professional Mukbang Streamer!
Let's wrap it with the pork belly
It's spicier than the Fire Carbonara
It's similar to the Fire Chicken Noodles
Kinda
I only cooked 5 packs, so I can still eat it all
It's okay
It's only 5
Egg yolk
Pop it on here
Wouldn't that kill the spice?

Just eat the egg whites
The egg yolk is everything
The truth Tasty
Wrap it like this
I think the spam will ease the spiciness
This is hot, so
It's hurting my tongue
It tastes good eating it like this (as a whole)
It's not salty
Maybe because I'm good at eating salty food
It could be salty for you guys
This won't be spicy to those who are good with spicy food If it's without the challenge sauce packet
It will just have a kick to it
As for me, It's spicy
It's manageable It's not spicy anymore
Maybe the first bowl had a lot of the challenge sauce on it?

Stack it like this
Yum
Wrap it with the thinly sliced pork belly
It's the best
Look, I'm almost done with it I ate half
And now for some spam
If you enjoy eating Bibimmyeon, but you want to spice it up
Then try this, you will like it
Not for me
Let's eat 1 more bowl
And put some challenge sauce on the rest
Will I be able to survive?
Thank you for the donations
Let's put the challenge sauce on here
I'm scared
It's tasty though

This got pretty dry, so I'm going to add some water with the challenge sauce
Let's put the sauce

That's a magma
Wait..
The meat just ran
Did it just fall?
It got scared of the sauce
I have a bad feeling about this
Where did that pork belly go?
It's gotta be at least this much for the challenge
I'm a mukbang streamer!
My mouth I can't talk
I don't have much left
I would like to talk, but..
My tongue hurts every time I talk

I can't talk
That just made everything better
I can talk now!
That's better
I'm cold now

Thanks everyone~
